sentences.arabic: كَانَ زِيَادٌ يَشْعُرُ بِالضَّغْطِ حِينَ تَكُونُ لَدَيْهِ وَاجِبَاتٌ كَثِيرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Ziad je osjećao pritisak kada je imao mnogo zadaća.
sentences.translationEn: Ziad used to feel pressure when he had many assignments.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ كُلَّ مَهَامِّهِ عَلَى وَرَقَةٍ وَرَتَّبَهَا.
sentences.translation: Zapisao je sve zadatke na papir i sredio ih.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote all his tasks on paper and organised them.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ بِالْمَهَمَّةِ الأَصْعَبِ أَوَّلًا ثُمَّ الأَسْهَلِ.
sentences.translation: Počeo je s najtežim zadatkom prvo, pa lakšim.
sentences.translationEn: He started with the hardest task first, then the easier ones.

sentences.translation: Završio je zadaće i osjetio olakšanje.
sentences.translationEn: He finished the assignments and felt relief.
